title: althaea tournefortiana
intro: Althaea tournefortiana, also known as marsh mallow or marshmallow, is a perennial plant species in the mallow family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, demulcent, and soothing effects. Althaea tournefortiana is known for its health benefits, which include soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and providing relief from skin irritations and wounds. The plant can be used to make herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and salves, which are often used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
